 [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. — File recreated after Vite scaffold.

 [x] Clarify Project Requirements — Target a browser-based Blockly maze clone using JavaScript/TypeScript and modern frontend tooling.

 [x] Scaffold the Project — Vite vanilla-ts scaffold generated via `npx create-vite@latest . -- --template vanilla-ts --force`.

 [x] Customize the Project — Implemented Blockly workspace, maze runtime, custom levels, and UI to mirror Blockly Games Maze behaviour.

 [x] Install Required Extensions — No additional extensions required beyond defaults.

 [x] Compile the Project — `npm run build` completes without errors (chunk-size warning from Blockly noted).

 [x] Create and Run Task — Not needed; npm scripts suffice for build and dev workflows.

 [ ] Launch the Project — Awaiting user confirmation before starting the dev server.

 [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete — README created and instructions updated; HTML comments removed per guidelines.

 Work through each checklist item systematically.
 Keep communication concise and focused.
 Follow development best practices.
